OPTION: 1  
REASONING: Combining Receipt 1 and Receipt 2 yields a single, coherent receipt. It includes a clear merchant name (“MOODY MARKET AND PROVISIONS”), a full address (2891 AGOURA RD, WESTLAKE VILLAGE, CA 91361), a phone number ((747) 222‑7677), an item line (“Big Waygu Beef Bowl”), and a complete set of amounts (subtotal $21.00, tax $1.52, total $22.52). The layout flows logically as one transaction, meeting all validity criteria. The other options mix unrelated credit‑card statements with the food receipt, resulting in incoherent or incomplete information.

OPTION: 3  
REASONING: Combining Receipt 2 (which contains clear merchant name, address, phone, date, order number and an item “Big Waygu Beef Bowl”) with Receipt 3 (which supplies the missing monetary details – subtotal, tax, total, tip, etc.) produces a single, logically ordered receipt that includes all required elements (merchant info, address, phone, item list, and total). The other combinations either merge two unrelated receipts (Option 1) or add unrelated numeric data to an already complete receipt, resulting in incoherence (Option 2). Hence, Option 3 is the only combination that forms a valid, complete receipt.

OPTION: 3  
REASONING: Combining Receipt 2 (the Moody Market & Provisions take‑out receipt) with Receipt 3 (the missing totals section) produces a single, logical receipt. It contains the merchant name, full address, phone number, an item line (“Big Waygu Beet Bowl”), and a complete set of monetary values (subtotal, tax, total, change). The text flows coherently and no critical information appears omitted, unlike the other combinations which merge unrelated Sprouts and Moody Market fragments or leave totals without context. Hence, option 3 is the only valid, complete receipt.
